view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that the appointments are indeed fixed-duration, specifically 50 minutes, as indicated in the 'customer-book-primary' and 'customer-two-concurrent' steps. Both bookings show a 'defaultDurationMin' of 50 in their 'pricingSnapshot', which directly supports the requirement of fixed-duration appointments. Additionally, the linked use case explicitly states the need for fixed-duration appointments, aligning with the evidence of successful bookings.
